bosses.name: Warlord Parjesh
bosses.summary_candidate: Hatecoil naga commander; encounter centered on Impaling Spear positioning, Call Reinforcements and add control.

role_notes_candidate.tank: Pick up Shellbreakers from Call Reinforcements and use add positioning for Impaling Spear.
role_notes_candidate.healer: Expect extra healing if players are struck by Impaling Spear or fail positioning.
role_notes_candidate.dps: Kill naga reinforcements and position behind adds for Impaling Spear.

bosses.data_quality: candidate; verify against Blizzard API/in-game data before final boss page

bosses.name: Lady Hatecoil
bosses.summary_candidate: Naga sea witch encounter using water, sand dunes, lightning and shield/unlock context from Hatecoil Arcanists.

role_notes_candidate.tank: Use sand dunes for Static Nova and pick up Saltsea Globules during Beckon Storm.
role_notes_candidate.healer: Use sand dunes for Static Nova and manage movement around Focused Lightning; handle Curse of the Witch carefully.
role_notes_candidate.dps: Use sand dunes for Static Nova; move Focused Lightning away from dunes and kill globules.

bosses.unlock_notes_candidate: Arcane Shielding from nearby Hatecoil Arcanists must be handled before the boss is vulnerable. Source comments conflict on exact count, so this needs verification.
bosses.data_quality: candidate; verify against Blizzard API/in-game data before final boss page

bosses.name: Serpentrix
bosses.summary_candidate: Two-phase hydra/beast encounter around sinkholes; boss submerges at 66% and 33%, reappears elsewhere and summons Hydra Spawns.

role_notes_candidate.tank: Stay downwind during Violent Winds, avoid Poison Spit and interrupt Rampage after Submerge.
role_notes_candidate.healer: Keep moving from Toxic Wound/Toxic Puddle and watch group damage from missed interrupts/adds.
role_notes_candidate.dps: Prioritize Hydra Spawns, interrupt dangerous casts and avoid ground effects.

bosses.route_notes_candidate: Clear more surrounding trash than seems necessary; pulling extra trash during the boss can cause a wipe. Comments suggest doing Serpentrix before Hatecoil to avoid winds/seagulls, but route value needs verification.
bosses.data_quality: candidate; verify against Blizzard API/in-game data before final boss page

bosses.name: King Deepbeard
bosses.summary_candidate: Single-target fight with avoidable abilities and potential spiky party-wide damage.

role_notes_candidate.tank: Avoid Ground Slam impact; move for Call the Seas and Aftershock/Quake interactions.
role_notes_candidate.healer: Avoid Call the Seas and Aftershock; prepare for Gaseous Bubbles / Gaseous Explosion mistakes.
role_notes_candidate.dps: Avoid Call the Seas and Aftershock; handle Gaseous Bubbles correctly.

bosses.data_quality: candidate; verify against Blizzard API/in-game data before final boss page

bosses.name: Wrath of Azshara
bosses.summary_candidate: Final boss; single-target encounter with heavy movement and awareness requirements, storm hazards and arcane/frost/nature effects.

role_notes_candidate.tank: Remain in melee to prevent Raging Storms; dodge Mystic Tornado and Massive Deluge.
role_notes_candidate.healer: Dispel Arcane Bomb so players can move out; keep group in range during heavy movement.
role_notes_candidate.dps: Avoid Mystic Tornado and Arcane Bomb detonation; stay within healer range; melee should attack from the side.

bosses.unlock_notes_candidate: All four other bosses must be defeated first. After the protective dome dissipates, the four Naga summoners around Wrath of Azshara must be defeated before engaging the boss directly.
bosses.data_quality: candidate; verify against Blizzard API/in-game data before final boss page

data_quality_notes: Boss order is the working source-discovery order and should be confirmed against in-game journal/API before final entity pages.
Map pins and mechanics are candidate values extracted from user-pasted Wowhead pages.
Drops remain candidate-level and are stored separately in boss-loot-candidate.generated.json.
